# Stockfish Web Engine

JuChess ships the unmodified Stockfish.js 18 lite single-threaded release files:

- `stockfish-18-lite-single.js`
- `stockfish-18-lite-single.wasm`

Source and exact release:

- https://github.com/nmrugg/stockfish.js
- https://github.com/nmrugg/stockfish.js/releases/tag/v18.0.0

The engine is distributed under GPL-3.0. The complete license is in `Copying.txt`.
The JuChess review UI and move-classification logic are separate, independently
written code and are not copied from Chesskit.
